prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `5b37cb25`.
codex_response:
`5b37cb25` is implemented. The rule is: recolor each 5-cell background plus cut out of the foreground blobs using the border color for the one arm that stays open to non-foreground space. The solver and generator are in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5b37cb25/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5b37cb25/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5b37cb25/generator.py), and the hint correction is documented in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5b37cb25/notes.md).

The Sonnet summary had no entry. The Opus summary was useful as a starting point for the direction-to-frame-color mapping, but it was structurally wrong about “single-cell notches”; the official task uses existing plus-shaped background cutouts, so I corrected that in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5b37cb25/notes.md). The generator matches the family by building framed 30x30 grids with one interior foreground color, several large orthogonal blobs, and edge cutouts placed with spacing/open-side constraints so the plus motifs read like the official examples. No new primitive was needed.

Validation passed end to end: official verification passed `3/3`, the shared builder produced `1000` examples, and `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 5b37cb25` passed `1000/1000`. I also sanity-checked the generated sheets via terminal rendering and spot-checked examples from the built task file.

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5b37cb25/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5b37cb25/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5b37cb25/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5b37cb25/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5b37cb25/previews/preview_03.png).
